Class-Wizard 20 — Female Human Wizard: 20
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 14 (+2) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 17 (+3) Wisdom: 9 (-1) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 2; Strength: 2 Experience: 608554/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Durable: +1 Constitution
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Wizard (Wizard Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Boon Of The Night Spirit; Durable; Grappler; Musician; Savage Attacker; Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Wizard Features: Abjuration Savant; Abjurer; Arcane Recovery; Arcane Ward; Divination Savant; Diviner; Empowered Evocation; Epic Boon; Evocation Savant; Evoker; Expert Divination; Greater Portent; Illusion Savant; Illusionist; Illusory Reality; Illusory Self; Improved Illusions; Memorize Spell; Overchannel; Phantasmal Creatures; Portent; Potent Cantrip; Projected Ward; Ritual Adept; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); Scholar; Sculpt Spells; Signature Spells; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, Religion); Spell Breaker; Spell Mastery; Spell Resistance; Spellcasting; The Third Eye; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons); Wizard Subclass Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Wizard Subclass: 1 selection
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +8 Insight: (wis) +5 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) -1 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +9 Religion: (int) +9
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) -1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +1 Nature: (int) +15 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +3 Perception: (wis) -1 Survival: (wis) -1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Insight; Investigation; Nature; Religion
Expertise: Nature
Tool Proficiency: Bagpipes: (cha); Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Herbalism Kit: (int); Lute: (cha); Painter's Supplies: (wis); Three-Dragon Ante Set: (wis); Viol: (cha)
Languages: Abyssal; Celestial; Common
Skill Notes:
Musician: Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any Musical Instrument)
Scholar: Has expertise in a choice of proficient Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, or Religion
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Musician: Can give Heroic Inspiration to 6 allies at the end of a rest
Combat
Hit Points: 87 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 12
Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Mace (+7 1d6+1 B; Sap); Shortbow (+8 1d6+2 P R80/320; Vex); Sling (+8 1d4+2 B R30/120; Slow); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Can use a bonus action to become invisible in dim or no light; taking an action, bonus action, or reaction ends
Durable: Can use a bonus action to regain hit points from a Hit Die roll
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +1; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +9; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +5
Save Notes:
Boon Of The Night Spirit: In dim or no light, has resistance to all damage other than psychic and radiant
Durable: Has advantage on death saves
Spell Resistance: Has advantage vs. spells and resistance to spell damage
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1; W0: 5; W: 25 Spell Slots: W1: 4; W2: 3; W3: 3; W4: 3; W5: 3; W6: 2; W7: 2; W8: 1; W9: 1 Attack: C: +5; W: +9 Spell DC: C: 13; W: 17
Spells:
Acid Splash (W0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 4d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Antimagic Field (W8 Abju): 10' radius suppresses magic for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Eye (W4 Divi): R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Sword (W7 Evoc): 1
Conjure Minor Elementals (W4 Conj): Self attacks within 15' inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, or lightning for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Counterspell (W3 [Spell Breaker] Abju): R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Dispel Magic (W3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (W3 [Spell Breaker] Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dragon's Breath (W2 Tran): Touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Faithful Hound (W4 Conj): 1
Flesh To Stone (W6 Tran): R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Grease (W1 Conj): R60' 10' sq becomes difficult terrain and causes creatures to fall prone (save Dexterity negates) for 1 min
Instant Summons (W6 Conj): 1
Invisibility (W2 [The Third Eye] Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Jump (W1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Levitate (W2 Tran): R60' Target 500 lb object or creature rises 20' (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Mage Hand (W0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Missile (W1 Evoc): R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each [+Level creates +1 dart]
Major Image (W3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Meteor Swarm (W9 Evoc): R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Minor Illusion (W0 [Improved Illusions] Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Modify Memory (W5 Ench): R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; a target in battle has advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell [+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Plane Shift (W7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Poison Spray (W0 Conj): 1
Protection From Energy (W3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Ray Of Frost (W0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Rope Trick (W2 Tran): Touched rope leads to an extradimensional space with room for 8 creatures for 1 hr
Scrying (W5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Summon Beast (W2 [Phantasmal Creatures] Conj): R90' Summons an obedient bestial spirit (Armor Class 13; multiattack equal to half the spell level; inflicts 1d8+6 piercing) of air (20 hit points; fly 60'; does not provoke opportunity attacks when flying out of reach), land (30 hit points; move and climb 30'; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally), or water (30 hit points; swim 30'; water-breathing; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 5, and attack damage by 1]
Summon Fey (W3 [Phantasmal Creatures] Conj): R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40' and can teleport 30'; multiattack equal to half the spell level; short sword inflicts 1d6+6 HP piercing plus 1d6 force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting), or tricksy (can create darkness in a 5' cube for 1 rd after teleporting) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and piercing damage by 1]
Teleportation Circle (W5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
True Strike (W0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +9 attack bonus and inflicts +3d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Unseen Servant (W1 Conj): R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Magic Notes:
Greater Portent: Has increased Portent effects
Abjuration Savant: Spellbook contains 1 additional abjuration spell per available spell slot level
Arcane Recovery: Can recover 10 spell slot levels (level 5 maximum) at the end of a short rest once per long rest
Arcane Ward: After a long rest, can cause an abjuration spell to create a ward around self that can absorb 43 HP damage; once these are all used, casting another abjuration spell restores 2x the spell level to the ward
Divination Savant: Spellbook contains 1 additional divination spell per available spell slot level
Empowered Evocation: Evocation spells inflict +3 HP
Evocation Savant: Spellbook contains 1 additional evocation spell per available spell slot level
Expert Divination: Casting a divination spell restores a lower-level expended slot of up to level 5
Illusion Savant: Spellbook contains 1 additional illusion spell per available spell slot level
Illusory Reality: Can use a bonus action to make a harmless object in a self illusion real for 1 min
Illusory Self: Can use a reaction to cause an attack on self to miss once per short rest; can expend level 2+ spell slots for additional uses
Improved Illusions: Can cast illusions without verbal components, cast 10'+ ranged illusions at +60' range, and cast Minor Illusion to include both a sound and an image
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Memorize Spell: Can replace a prepared spell at the end of a short rest
Overchannel: Can inflict maximum damage when casting an evocation spell of up to level 5; additional uses before a long rest also inflict damage on self, starting at 2d12 HP necrotic and increasing by 1d12 HP on each successive use
Phantasmal Creatures: Can cast illusion versions of Summon Beast and Summon Fey and can cast either of them without expending a spell slot, creating a creature with half hit points, once per long rest
Portent: Can replace a visible target's attack, ability check, or save with a pre-rolled value 3 times per long rest
Potent Cantrip: Cantrips inflict half HP on a miss or successful save
Projected Ward: R30' Can use Arcane Ward to absorb damage to others
Ritual Adept: Can cast spells marked with [R] as rituals directly from spellbook
Sculpt Spells: When casting an evocation spell, can give spell level + 1 creatures a successful save and no damage instead of half
Signature Spells: Can cast 2 chosen W3 spells without expending a spell slot once per short rest
Spell Breaker: Can cast Dispel Magic as a bonus action and add 6 to the check, and a casting of Counterspell or Dispel Magic that fails to negate a spell does not expend a spell slot
Spell Mastery: Can cast a chosen 1-action W1 spell and a chosen 1-action W2 spell without expending a spell slot and change a choice after a long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
The Third Eye: Can use an bonus action once per short rest to gain 60' darkvision, the ability to read any language, or the ability to cast Invisibility without expending a spell slot until the next rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 4 allocated
